debug_info.goal:
case mk.cons
a : Type
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → bs.isEmpty = true ∨ bs.length = 1) ∧
    (bs.isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
simp only [List.tail_cons]
      cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp only [List.isEmpty_cons, Bool.false_eq_true, false_implies, List.length_cons,
          Nat.add_one_ne_one, or_false, and_true] at ok
        cases bs with
        | nil => simp [SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.snocSL]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp [SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.snocSL]
          rfl
      | cons m ms =>
        simp [SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.snocSL]
        rfl

simp only [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL]
      simp only [SymList.fromSL]
      cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp
        cases bs with
        | nil => simp [List.init]
        | cons m ms =>
          simp only [List.reverse_cons, List.append_assoc, List.singleton_append]
          simp [List.init, List.reverse_append]
      | cons m ms =>
        simp only [List.reverse_cons, List.append_assoc, List.singleton_append]
        simp [List.init, List.reverse_append]

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
      sorry

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]
      sorry

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
      sorry

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, SymList.nil, SymList.cons]
      sorry

simp only [List.append_assoc]
      simp [SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
      sorry
